scripts.start: concurrently "npm run gateway" "npm run products" "npm run orders" "npm run finance" "npm run marketing" "npm run support" "npm run reviews"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix api-gateway install && npm --prefix product-service install && npm --prefix order-service install && npm --prefix finance-service install && npm --prefix marketing-service install && npm --prefix customer-support-service install && npm --prefix reviews-service install
